litigation.mdlName: In re: Glucagon-like Peptide-1 Receptor Agonists (GLP-1 RAs) Products Liability Litigation
litigation.court: U.S. District Court, Eastern District of Pennsylvania

phaseDetail: First bellwether trials are scheduled to begin in September 2026. A second injury wave (NAION vision loss and related claims) is developing behind the gastrointestinal-injury track.

settlements.label: No settlements announced
settlements.detail: No global or individual settlement program has been announced. Industry analysts have estimated potential exposure in the tens of billions of dollars if plaintiffs prevail, but outcomes of the September 2026 bellwether trials are expected to shape any settlement posture.

keyDates.label: MDL-3094 created
keyDates.detail: JPML centralized federal GLP-1 cases before Judge Karen S. Marston in the Eastern District of Pennsylvania.

keyDates.label: 3,763 pending federal cases
keyDates.detail: MDL continued steady monthly growth through the first half of 2026.

keyDates.label: First bellwether trials begin (scheduled)
keyDates.detail: Initial bellwether trials on gastroparesis and gastrointestinal-injury claims are scheduled to start September 2026.

sources.name: FDA — Ozempic (semaglutide) label and safety information
